fixes_applied.original_violation: HIGH: GeminiClient doesn't implement LLMClient abstract interface
fixes_applied.fix: Created app/llm/interface.py with strict LLMClient interface. GeminiClient now inherits from LLMClient and implements generate() and embed() methods with correct signatures.

fixes_applied.original_violation: MEDIUM: GeminiClient has multiple responsibilities beyond model invocation
fixes_applied.fix: Extracted cross-cutting concerns into separate services: CacheService (app/core/cache_service.py), RetryPolicy (app/core/retry_policy.py), LLMService (app/llm/llm_service.py). GeminiClient now only handles API communication.
fixes_applied.verification: tests/test_cache_service.py (6/6 PASSED), tests/test_retry_policy.py (5/5 PASSED), tests/test_llm_service.py (4/4 PASSED)

fixes_applied.original_violation: MEDIUM: System and user prompts not distinguishable
fixes_applied.fix: Created PromptBundle dataclass (app/prompt_versioning/schema.py) with separate system_prompt and user_prompt fields. Updated PromptVersionManager.get_prompt_bundle() to parse SYSTEM:/USER: format. Updated LLMClient.generate() to accept separate system and user prompts.

fixes_applied.original_violation: MEDIUM: TranslationOrchestrator depends on concrete LLMClient
fixes_applied.fix: Updated TranslationOrchestrator to depend on LLMService (which wraps LLMClient interface). This enables swapping LLM providers without changing orchestrator code.

A_LLM_Interface_Integrity.1_no_dependency_graph_logic: PASS - No dependency graph traversal in LLM interface
A_LLM_Interface_Integrity.2_no_ast_manipulation: PASS - No AST manipulation in LLM interface
A_LLM_Interface_Integrity.3_no_context_expansion: PASS - No context expansion in LLM interface
A_LLM_Interface_Integrity.4_single_responsibility: PASS - GeminiClient only handles API invocation
A_LLM_Interface_Integrity.5_token_usage_logged: PASS - Token usage tracked in LLMResponse and logged

B_Translation_Orchestrator_Control.8_circular_dependency_handling: PASS - Detected before translation via nx.is_directed_acyclic_graph

C_Prompt_Governance.14_version_logged: PASS - Prompt version tracked in pipeline_result.prompt_versions

E_Cross_Layer_Violations.18_no_ingestion_imports_in_llm: PASS - No cross-layer imports in LLM layer
E_Cross_Layer_Violations.20_no_hardcoded_limits: PASS - Token limits from Settings via get_settings()

summary: All architectural violations from Phase 03 audit have been successfully fixed. The LLM layer now follows strict interface-driven design with proper separation of concerns. GeminiClient implements the LLMClient interface, cross-cutting concerns are extracted to separate services, and system/user prompts are distinguishable. The system is now provider-agnostic and supports swapping LLM implementations without changing business logic.
